entity.summary: Automated-market-maker exchange associated with the BMX by Morphex perpetuals ecosystem on Base and Mode, preserved through substantial cumulative DEX volume but without sufficient recent activity evidence for an active classification.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves BMX Classic AMM across Base and Mode and reports roughly $690 million in cumulative DEX volume. Strong recent activity metrics were not exposed in the reviewed profile, and the first-party site could not be independently verified during this pass. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies BMX Classic AMM as a Base and Mode automated-market-maker exchange associated with BMX by Morphex.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the BMX Classic AMM identity and Base and Mode chain associations.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM cumulative volume record
evidence.notes: Substantial cumulative DEX volume remains documented, but recent activity and first-party availability are insufficient, supporting a limited classification.
